enrichment.summary: Kyle announces a new daily news commentary series called 'News with Kyle,' done by request. He scrolls through Huffington Post articles and reacts to stories on Mexico's drug war, gravity waves, and the 2016 US presidential primary race, commenting on Trump, Bernie Sanders, Marco Rubio, Hillary Clinton, and Jeb Bush.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: blames illegality of drugs for the violence — it's the people's fault for making drugs illegal

stances.topic: Bernie Sanders vs Trump general election
stances.position: expects it will be Bernie vs Trump and thinks that would be a good matchup
thinks he's effectively done after getting caught repeating the same scripted speech twice

stances.topic: Jeb Bush calling Trump a loser
stances.position: thinks Bush should have been more serious since Trump is actually winning
thinks everyone should do personal news commentary to stay informed and keep a record of their opinions
